subcodes.first_line: In this day the divine fragrance wafteth from the garment of His Cause; verily every soul endowed with spiritual perception doth inhale it, and the Sun of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز عرف الهی از قمیص امرش متضوعست البته هر ذی شمی ادراک مینماید و آفتاب وجه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @living waters; water of life
